name: Tomato Okra Pilau
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chopped bacon in a deep frying pan until brown; remove the bacon and fry the onion in the fat until brown.
2. Add the tomatoes and okra and let them cook until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Cook the rice in 2 quarts of water with 1 teaspoon of salt added.
5. After 12 minutes, drain the cooked rice.
6. Mix the tomato mixture and place it on top of a double boiler.
7. Steam for 15-20 minutes.
8. Add the bacon just before serving.
